jp.title: 小泉今日子「年内休養」発表なぜ（1/5ページ）
jp.description: 女優で歌手の小泉今日子（60）が、5月10日の沖縄でのツアー最終日をもって、年内の全活動を休止することが明らかになった。自身が代表取締役を務める制作会社「明後日」の公式サイトで9日、発表された。還暦を迎え、精力的に全国を駆け抜けていた歌姫…

jp.title: 関東～九州は16日頃から30℃以上の所が一気に増える エアコンの準備を
jp.description: この先2週間は東北から九州で気温が平年より高いでしょう。特に来週末からは一段と暑くなり、関東から九州では30℃以上の所が一気に増えそうです。早めにエアコンのお手入れや試運転を行い、本格的な暑さに備えましょう。

jp.title: 米FA18によるイランタンカー攻撃、どのように行われたのか？ 煙突に精密誘導弾を撃ち込み航行不能に
jp.description:
（CNN）　米軍の発表によると、海軍のFA18戦闘攻撃機が8日、イラン船籍のタンカー2隻の煙突に精密誘導弾を撃ち込み、航行不能にした。実戦使用されている兵器の精度の高さを示す出来事だ。
中東での軍

jp.title: ME:I・RINON＆SUZU、“末っ子ライン”メンバーの共通点 お互いに尊敬する点は？「グループの中でも群を抜いています」【モデルプレスインタビュー】
jp.description: ガールズグループ・ME:I（ミーアイ）のRINON（リノン／19）とSUZU（スズ／19）が、ファッション＆⾳楽イベント「Rakuten GirlsAward 2026 SPRING／SUMMER」（4月18日＠東京・国⽴代々⽊競技場第⼀体育館）に出演。バックステージでモデルプレスのインタビューに応じ、お互いの共通点や尊敬している部分について語ってくれた。

world.title: Over 200,000 people newly diagnosed with chronic kidney disease in Singapore over four years
world.description: SINGAPORE: More than 200,000 residents in Singapore were newly detected over a span of four years as showing signs of impaired kidney function. With a 1,000-odd Healthier SG clinics outside the public healthcare sector now tapped to monitor and care for these patients.

world.title: New measurements of Jupiter show its shape is shorter and flatter
world.description: Juno mission's radio occultation data redefines Jupiter’s shape, slightly reducing its measured diameter and improving models of its makeup.

world.title: WhatsApp Plus for iOS users: Cost, availability, features
world.description: Because it is still under Beta rollout, iOS users can check in the WhatsApp app settings to see if the subscription is available to their account

world.title: PM Abiy in Djibouti to Attend Inauguration Ceremony of President-elect Guelleh
world.description:
Addis Ababa, May 9, 2026 —Ethiopia’s Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed is in Djibouti today to attend the inauguration ceremony of President-elect Ismaïl Omar Guelleh.
“I extend my heartfelt congratulations and best wishes on his leadership and service to the people of Djibouti,” PM Abiy shared on his social media channels.
He further stated that he hopes the longstanding friendship and strategic partnership between Ethiopia and Djibouti will continue to grow stronger for the mutual prosperity of both peoples and the peace and stability of the region.
 
According to Office of the Prime Minister, the Premier traveled to Djibouti ahead of the inauguration ceremony scheduled to take place today.
The visit reflects the longstanding partnership between Ethiopia and Djibouti, particularly in the areas of regional integration, trade, transport connectivity, and infrastructure development.
Ismaïl Omar Guelleh was re-elected for a fifth term as president with more than 98 percent of the vote.
Djibouti held its presidential election on April 10, 2026, with incumbent President Guelleh competing against opposition candidate Mohamed Farah Samatar.
A total of 67 international observers were deployed to monitor the election, representing regional and international organizations including the African Union, Intergovernmental Authority on Development (IGAD), League of Arab States, and the Organisation of Islamic Cooperation.
 
The African Union observer mission, the largest among the deployed teams, was led by Bernard Makuza, while the IGAD delegation was headed by former Ethiopian President Mulatu Teshome.
According to Djibouti’s Ministry of Interior, 256,467 voters were registered nationwide, including more than 162,000 in the capital, Djibouti City.
Voting took place across 712 polling stations, 413 of them located in Djibouti City, highlighting the country’s highly concentrated urban electorate.
 
Analysts say the election drew significant regional and international attention due to Djibouti’s strategic location along the Red Sea and its role as a major regional trade and security hub.

world.title: Carl Froch makes final KO prediction for Fabio Wardley vs Daniel Dubois: "He'll stop him late"
world.description: Carl Froch has offered his final verdict on Fabio Wardley vs Daniel Dubois, predicting a “late” stoppage in their heavyweight tussle.

world.title: Israeli army shells southern Lebanon, destroys homes in new strikes
world.description: Shelling targets towns of Braashit, Safad al-Battikh, Touline, as Tel Aviv continues truce violations

world.title: PM Shehbaz to visit China from May 23 to 25
world.description: PM Shehbaz Sharif will visit China from May 23-25 for talks on CPEC, trade and investment, with meetings expected with Xi Jinping and Li Qiang.

world.title: Tanzania's Global Standing Strengthens Amid Strategic Diplomatic Appointments and Regional Leadership
world.description: Tanzania leverages strategic appointments within the AU and EAC to consolidate unmatched diplomatic power and drive massive foreign economic investment.

world.title: Victor Wembanyama joins Shaq, Hakeem and Kareem in the record books as Spurs take Game 3
world.description: The 22-year-old center became just the fourth player in NBA history to record 35+ points, 15+ rebounds and 5+ blocks in a playoff game, leading San Antonio to a 115-108 win over Minnesota.

world.title: New political landscape sets in
world.description: Labour has lost several long-held seats in London, transforming the political infrastructure.
